zh.Alnwick, Northumberland, England: 英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克
zh.St Albans, Hertfordshire, England: 英國賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯
zh.Leconfield, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾萊康費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Percy Earl of Northumberland 3.於1421年7月25日出生在英國越可爾萊康費爾德時，他的父親Henry Percy 2nd Earl of Northumberland28歲，母親Eleanor Neville24歲。他於1435年6月25日與Eleanor Poynings Countess of Northumberland結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1455年登記服兵役。他於1417年被列為warden of the eastern march。他去世於1461年3月29日在英國越可爾堂頓享年39歲，埋葬在英國越可爾約克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Percy Earl of Northumberland 3.于1421年7月25日出生在英国越可爾萊康費爾德时，他的父亲Henry Percy 2nd Earl of Northumberland28岁，母亲Eleanor Neville24岁。他于1435年6月25日与Eleanor Poynings Countess of Northumberland结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1455年登记服兵役。他于1417年被列为warden of the eastern march。他去世于1461年3月29日在英国越可爾堂頓享年39岁，埋葬在英国越可爾約克。

nameMeanings.name: Percy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Old French percehaie ‘pierce hedge’ (Old French percer ‘to pierce, penetrate’ + haie ‘hedge, fence’), perhaps with the sense of someone breaking into an enclosure. Percehaie is the name of one of the sons of the foxes Renart and Hermeline in the medieval French epic Roman de Renart, whose earliest known version is from the 1170s. The surname is older than that, but it may originate in a nickname for the fox as ‘enclosure piercer’, perhaps amounting to ‘chicken thief’.

habitational name from any of several places called Percy in Calvados, Eure, and Manche; William de Perci, the Domesday tenant-in-chief and under-tenant of Hugh, Earl of Chester, came from either Percy-en-Auge (Eure) or Percy (Manche).

variants.name: Piercey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

variants.name: Piercy
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Percy Earl of Northumberland 3. was born on 25 July 1421, in Leconfield, Yorkshire, England, his father, Henry Percy 2nd Earl of Northumberland, was 28 and his mother, Eleanor Neville, was 24. He married Eleanor Poynings Countess of Northumberland on 25 June 1435. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He registered for military service in 1455. In 1417, his occupation is listed as warden of the eastern march. He died on 29 March 1461, in Towton, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 39, and was buried in York, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Percy Earl of Northumberland 3. est né le 25 juillet 1421, à Leconfield, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Henry Percy 2nd Earl of Northumberland, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Neville, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Poynings Countess of Northumberland le 25 juin 1435. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1455. En 1417, sa profession de son indiquée est warden of the eastern march. Il est décédé le 29 mars 1461, à Towton, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à York, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Percy Earl of Northumberland 3. am 25. Juli 1421 in Leconfield, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Percy 2nd Earl of Northumberland 28 und seine Mutter Eleanor Neville 24. Er hat am 25. Juni 1435 Eleanor Poynings Countess of Northumberland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er hat sich 1455 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1417 ist sein Beruf als warden of the eastern march aufgeführt. Er starb am 29. März 1461 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Towton, Yorkshire, England und wurde in York, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Percy Earl of Northumberland 3. è nato il il 25 luglio 1421 nel Leconfield, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Henry Percy 2nd Earl of Northumberland, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Neville, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Poynings Countess of Northumberland il 25 giugno 1435. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1455. Nel 1417, la sua occupazione è indicata come warden of the eastern march. Morì il 29 marzo 1461, nel Towton, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolto a York, Yorkshire, England.

ja.Leconfield, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアレコンフィールド
ja.lifeSummary: Henry Percy Earl of Northumberland 3.が1421年7月25日にイギリスヨークシュアイアレコンフィールドで生まれた時，父Henry Percy 2nd Earl of Northumberlandは28歳，母Eleanor Nevilleは24歳であった。1435年6月25日にEleanor Poynings Countess of Northumberlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1455年に兵役登録をした。1417年，職業はwarden of the eastern marchと記録されている。彼は1461年3月29日にイギリスヨークシュアイアトウトンで39歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアヨークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Percy Earl of Northumberland 3.(이)가 1421년 7월 25일 영국 요르크실르 렉필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Percy 2nd Earl of Northumberland(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Neville(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1435년 6월 25일 Eleanor Poynings Countess of Northumberland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1455년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1417년, 그의 직업은 warden of the eastern march이었다. 그는 1461년 3월 29일 영국 요르크실르 타우턴에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 요르크에 묻혔다.

mn.25 July 1421–29 March 1461: 1421 оны Долоодугаар сарын 25–1461 оны Гуравдугаар сарын 29

pt.25 July 1421–29 March 1461: 25 de julho de 1421–29 de março de 1461
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Percy Earl of Northumberland 3. nasceu em 25 de julho de 1421, em Leconfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Percy 2nd Earl of Northumberland, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Neville, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Poynings Countess of Northumberland em 25 de junho de 1435. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1455. Em 1417, sua profissão aparece como warden of the eastern march. Ele faleceu em 29 de março de 1461, em Towton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 39 anos, e foi sepultado em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Percy Earl of Northumberland 3. родился 25 июля 1421 г. в местности леконфиелд, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Percy 2nd Earl of Northumberland было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Neville, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Poynings Countess of Northumberland 25 июня 1435 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. В 1455 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1417 годуработал по профессии warden of the eastern march. Он умер 29 марта 1461 г. в местности тоутон, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия.

es.25 July 1421–29 March 1461: 25 de julio de 1421–29 de marzo de 1461
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Percy Earl of Northumberland 3. nació el 25 de julio de 1421, en Leconfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Percy 2nd Earl of Northumberland, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Eleanor Neville, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Eleanor Poynings Countess of Northumberland el 25 de junio de 1435. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1455. En 1417, su ocupación registrada era warden of the eastern march. Murió el 29 de marzo de 1461, en Towton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultado en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
